description.ko: 유기적인 아름다움이 첨단 회로에 의해 강화되어 생물학적인 것과 기술적인 것이 융합된 디지털 꽃의 정교한 모습.
description.en: An intricate look at a digital flower where organic beauty is reinforced by advanced circuitry, merging the biological with the technological.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic shot of FLORA-9, titled 'The Silicon Stamen.' A futuristic botanical organism featuring translucent #FFB6C1 pale pink petals with embedded #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry and #89CFF0 cyan fiber-optic veins. The plant is rooted in a bed of #4A0E4E deep plum soil consisting of crushed data shards. Shimmering digital pollen floats in the air like glowing pixels. Soft bokeh background of a cybernetic forest, ethereal lighting, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 render style.
